creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Jan 8, 2012 at 2:35 AM,  <eadler@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: [update] textproc/ibus 1.4.0
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->eadler
> Responsible-Changed-By: eadler
> Responsible-Changed-When: Sun Jan 8 07:35:48 UTC 2012
> Responsible-Changed-Why:
> I'll take it.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163791

I'll handle it this time but please *do not* submit shars for updates.
Instead submit a diff between the old version and new version.
Only use shars for new ports or most committers (including myself)
will get very upset.



-- 
Eitan Adler
Ports committer
X11, Bugbusting teams
